summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of SnapRoad car customization feature completed. All features working correctly: Car Studio with 3 tabs (Garage, Paint Shop, Upgrades), 7 car categories, 24 colors (8 Standard, 6 Metallic, 4 Matte, 6 Premium), real-time car preview updates, rotation controls, Apply Changes button, and car navigation marker on map.
critical_code_review_comments: Car Onboarding only shows on first visit when has_completed_onboarding is false - working as designed
Premium colors show lock icons with gem prices - purchase flow implemented correctly
seed_data_creation: Backend uses in-memory mock data with car configuration
context_for_next_testing_agent: Car customization feature fully tested. Car Studio accessible from Profile > My Car card. All 7 car categories work. All 24 colors work with real-time preview. Rotation controls work. Apply Changes button appears when changes made. Map shows user's car as navigation marker.

car_onboarding.notes: Onboarding shows on first visit when has_completed_onboarding is false. Skip button available. 3 steps: Category, Style, Color.

features: User's car shown in profile header avatar
My Car card shows car preview with color name and category
Customize → button opens Car Studio
All 7 car categories visible: Sedan, SUV, Sports Car, Truck, Hatchback, Luxury, Electric
Category selection updates car preview in real-time
STYLE section shows variant options for selected category
3D car preview with rotation controls
CURRENT COLOR section shows selected color name and preview
STANDARD section: 8 colors
METALLIC ✨ section: 6 colors
MATTE section: 4 colors
PREMIUM 💎 section: 6 colors with lock icons and gem prices
Color selection updates car preview in real-time
24 total color buttons found
Coming Soon! message displayed
Rims, Spoilers & Decals preview
3 upgrade categories shown (all marked Coming Soon)
3 rotation buttons: left, reset, right
Rotate left/right changes car angle
Reset button returns to original position
Drag to rotate hint visible
Button appears when car category, variant, or color is changed
Button hidden when no changes made
User's car shown as navigation marker in center of map
Car icon replaces traditional blue dot
Pulsing ring animation around car when stationary
Gems balance shown in Car Studio header (12,400)
Premium colors show gem prices for purchase

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data. Car configuration stored per user. Premium color purchases deduct gems from user balance.
